---
title: "Nauplii_Plastic_Assays"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: installing-packages
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(janitor)
```

```{r}
#| label: loading-data

nauplii_plastic_raw <- read_csv("Data/Nauplii_Plastic_Data.csv")
nauplii_plastic <- clean_names(nauplii_plastic_raw)

```

```{r}
#| label: aged-ps

nauplii_plastic |>
  filter(treatment == "Aged PS") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(concentration_mg_m_l), y = percent_mortality, fill = factor(concentration_mg_m_l))) +
  geom_col()

```

```{r}
aged_summary <- nauplii_plastic |>
  filter(treatment == "Aged PS") |>
  group_by(concentration_mg_m_l) |>
  summarise(
    mean_mortality = mean(percent_mortality, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_mortality = sd(percent_mortality, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    se_mortality = sd_mortality / sqrt(n)
  )

ggplot(aged_summary, aes(x = factor(concentration_mg_m_l), y = mean_mortality, fill = concentration_mg_m_l)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_mortality - sd_mortality,
        ymax = mean_mortality + sd_mortality),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Concentration",
    y = "% Mortality",
    title = "Aged PS Mean Mortality ± SD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
